hero.headline: Building Intelligent Digital Systems
hero.subheadline: Full-stack developer focused on AI-powered web and mobile applications.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I'm Mohamed Nour Cherif, a full-stack developer who builds intelligent systems at the intersection of web, mobile, and artificial intelligence.
about.p2: I specialize in creating high-performance applications that leverage modern frameworks, cloud infrastructure, and AI capabilities to solve real-world problems.
about.p3: With a deep passion for clean architecture and thoughtful design, I craft digital experiences that are both technically excellent and visually refined.
about.p4: I'm always exploring new technologies and pushing the boundaries of what's possible with code.
